positive: A retro 80s synthwave scene: a stylized sunset over a grid-lined ocean, featuring three silhouetted palm trees and a distant chrome sports car. Neon pink, electric turquoise, and deep purple gradient background. Vaporwave aesthetic, vaporwave vaporwave, vaporwave art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, natural lighting
